name: Choc-Oat-Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together the margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add the granulated sugar, eggs, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and salt; mix well.
5. Fold in the oats, chocolate chips, and nuts; mix thoroughly.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 9 to 10 minutes for a chewy cookie or 12 to 13 minutes for a crisp cookie.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a wire rack.
9. Cool completely.
